steps.title: Substitute x = 39 into the equation
steps.content:
The equation $y = 0.67x + 2.6$ predicts larvae count for a given number of worker ants. With $x = 39$ worker ants, substitute directly:
$$y = 0.67(39) + 2.6$$

steps.title: Evaluate and identify the closest choice
steps.content:
Multiply first: $0.67 \times 39 = 26.13$. Then add the constant:
$$y = 26.13 + 2.6 = 28.73$$
Among the choices $29$, $42$, $54$, and $128$, the value $28.73$ is closest to $29$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
